description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a robust, rectangular double-sided head made of dark, metallic material. The head features beveled edges and a central, raised diamond-shaped detail, giving it a reinforced and ornamental appearance. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of a dense, dark wood or composite, with subtle texturing and banded segments for improved grip. The ends of the hammer head are capped with thick, dark bands, likely for added durability and shock absorption. The overall design is utilitarian yet slightly ornate, suggesting it could be used for both functional and ceremonial purposes in an urban or industrial setting. The hammer shows no visible signs of wear, damage, or branding, and lacks any additional attachments or accessories.
description: A large, double-sided sledgehammer with a dark, metallic head and a long, textured handle. The hammer features a central diamond detail and reinforced end caps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the double-sided hammer head, central diamond detail, and the length of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular profile of the hammer head and the thickness of the end caps.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the opposite face of the hammer head and handle alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same rectangular head profile and end cap details.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight, dark wooden or composite handle with subtle texturing and segmented bands for grip enhancement.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular, double-sided sledgehammer head with beveled edges, reinforced end caps, and a central raised diamond detail.
